item.title: 6 Years In This Abyss
item.description: I love you all, yes even you. Especially YOU!
item.dc:creator: slotheroll

item.title: Imgur! We NEED your help in order to save video games!
item.description:
Greetings dear Imgurians! Allow me to interrupt your daily meme binge to let you know about a campaign started by the man above. His name is Ross Scott and you may know him from his Youtube channel "Accursed Farms". On the 2nd of April, he launched the website "https://www.stopkillinggames.com/" which I implore you to check out. More info right below!
Now, you're probably wondering what this website and campaign is about, so let me tell you! On December 2nd 2014, Ubisoft, well known for franchises such as Rayman, Assassin's Creed and others, launched a new title called "The Crew". This new racing game allowed you to roam around a scale-downed, but still immense, version of the mainland USA. Unfortunately the game launched with a online-only requirement, as all your progress was saved on Ubisoft's servers. Which brings us to today: Ubisoft has now shutdown said servers since the 31st of March, rendering the game unplayable. If you fail to see why this is an issue, remember that some people (maybe you?) paid for this product. Could you imagine a similar situation with any other product? Could you imagine if your car stopped running over night because the manufacturer decided he didn't want you to keep using it? While this might be perfectly legal in the hellish land known as the USA, this is a legal grey area in many countries, such as France or Australia, both having strong consumer protection laws. And since Ubisoft's headquarters are located in France, this is an ideal situation to fight against ANY publisher that might try to kill games in the future. Think about Evolve that was killed by EA, think about Lawbreakers that was killed by Nexon, think about... When do we, as consumers, say stop? Now. Now is the time.
By going to https://www.stopkillinggames.com/ you will find out what actions you might be able to take. This might be contacting the FTC if you're in the US, signing a government petition if you're in the UK, or, REGARDLESS OF YOUR COUNTRY, going over to the french consumer protection agency known as the DGCCRF and fill a complain with them. If this gains enough traction and France forces Ubisoft to make The Crew playable again, this would be a BIG precedent, potentially saving games for ever! No more games lost because some dude wanted you to purchase their latest release or whatever! Edit: Yes the EULA for most game says that you don't own the product, that it is only licenced to you. But in many countries in the EU, and in Australia, this would probably be illegal, as you're making a one time payement to obtain a good. You are not providing recurring payements to access a service clearly limited in time. This has never been challenged with a legal instance! Now's the perfect time to do so! Here's a video that explains it all: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w70Xc9CStoE Or if you want a 50sec TL;DR: https://www.youtube.com/shorts/iH7k0IZ5PYE One last thing: "Is this a post to promote some random dude's YT channel?"
Doesn't matter if you don't watch either video, doesn't matter if you downvote either ones, all I'm asking is for you to check out the site: https://www.stopkillinggames.com/ WE CAN DO IT! Come on Imgur, let's see what this community is capable of! Let's stick it to the man! Oh and here's a comment to downvote as I'm not looking to be a karma whore: https://imgur.com/gallery/i019Dna/comment/2388341813 Credit to "mrglanet" and on discord and "danielsangeo" for making the memes used in this post!
item.dc:creator: AsocialOddDuck

item.title: The 423rd vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps -- Kids Are The Future ep 3
item.description:
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
He's not wrong
Alabama?
My SIL wouldn't let me buy this for the nephews
She made the right choice
THEY YEARN FOR THE MINES
The question only changes to "Do you wanna go for a walk?!"
The main part I remember is all the boys immediately strip down to their underwear. Am I gay? Maybe a little. Did I know it then? Maybe a little.
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #Children #Kids #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: I PAINTED THIS PAINTING OF MICHELANGELO'S DAVID!
item.description: I painted this oil painting on a wooden panel. It's a portrait of the famous sculpture David of Michelangelo. I already sold this painting so it's not available anymore. :) If this is the first time you come across me, I'm a 21-year-old, self-taught artist who just started studying fine arts at the fine arts academy so if you'd like to support me, make sure to follow me! Thank you all very much for all fo your support and special thanks to all of you who donate to support me. Both the ones who donate monthly on patreon, and the ones to who donate one-time donations via PayPal. It couldn't mean more to me and it helps a lot! Thank you all so much! You can support me with a one-time donation here: https://www.paypal.me/anisjerbi Or with a monthly donation here: https://www.patreon.com/Anis_Jerbi_art If you'd like to see all of my artworks, you can via my official website: https://www.anisjerbi.com and if you'd like to commission an artwork from me or purchase one of my artworks (like this one), let me know by sending me a dm, a comment under this post or by contacting me via my official website: anisjerbi.com Alright, I love you all and see you all in the comments, DM's, etc. You name it. :) I'm sorry for neglecting Imgur lately but I've been extremely busy with work and studies and the video size errors on here did not help.
item.dc:creator: AnisJerbi

item.description: Sit and just chill for two seconds. How are you doing today? Do you need something to eat or drink? Take care of yourselves because I love you

item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
getting some snow tonight/tomorrow i guess
absolutely
as is tradition
damn that thing is sleek
used to spend most of my childhood in trees
my dog is too old for such shenanigans
that's reassuring
probably a good place to start
mmm hmm
i've been attacked again
pretty sure they would've done it for free
well that's just way too cute
yes
i do
that's me
doesn't happen too often
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Cake Day Post (as was the style at the time)
item.description:
Groonk!
Yes, yes, Oglaf. One of the few SFW ones.
GNU. Just finished Unseen Academical, would have loved to see what Sir Pterry would have done with orcs.
I live in SD, this cat reminds me of our governor.
Ms. Patsy smiles upon you. For my Cake Day feel free to send noodles, that's the tradition, right?

item.title: Farewell @DarwinFinch…
item.description: It is with a sad heart I post the news of the passing of Imgur’s @DarwinFinch. On Instagram she went by the name @hollywiththemd. She was wonderful soul who understood and accepted her illness and faced it with bravery. She didn’t want to be inspiring but she was. Her posts here on Imgur showed a person living with a fatal disease NOT dying from it. I will miss her. Here’s the source: https://www.instagram.com/p/C5IxwTkRf3b/?igsh=MzRlODBiNWFlZA== Edit: Thanks for making this most viral for Holly. I’m so glad that others remember her here! She was a memorable part of our community. Thank you most for your fond remembering of Holly. I have sent her family the link to this post.
item.dc:creator: theshadowlander

item.title: Its Cat Wednesday! Cat Vidya Dump vol 5
item.description: Hello people of Imgur! We started up a chill community server for everyone over 18 to come and hang out. We've gotten some really nice and friendly people. In the future there's going to be movie nights and game nights. If memes, pets, LGBTIQ+ positive vibes and mature chatting environment sounds good to you, click the link and come say hello! https://discord.gg/goodmorn

item.title: New California bill could fine bosses for texting their employees after work hours
item.description: A new California bill would potentially fine employers for — unless there’s an emergency — repeatedly trying to get in touch with their workers after work hours. Assemblymember Matt Haney, a Democrat from San Francisco, sponsored the bill. Assembly Bill 2751 is modeled after so-called “right to disconnect” laws that are popular in other countries such as Belgium and France. Though regulations vary, the laws generally provide legal protections for workers who wish to ignore work-related communications when they’re not on the clock. “If you’re working a 9-to-5 job, you shouldn’t be expected to be working 24/7,” Haney told the San Francisco Standard. “That should be available to everyone, regardless of the existence of smartphones.” The bill requires workers and their employers to enter into a written agreement that stipulates when “nonworking” hours are. If the employer repeatedly tries to contact a worker during those hours, the law says, employees can file a complaint with the state Labor Commissioner’s Office, which may result in a fine for their boss. The California Chamber of Commerce opposes the bill, the chamber’s senior policy advocate, Ashley Hoffman, wrote Haney a letter in which she said California already has protocols in place that disincentivize bosses from asking employees to work after hours. Those include overtime pay, breaks for rests and meals, as well as on-call and standby pay, she said. “The bill will effectively subject all employees to a rigid working schedule and prohibit communication between employers and employees absent an emergency,” https://www.sfgate.com/politics/article/calif-bill-fine-bosses-texting-workers-after-hours-19382049.php
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin
